parameters.jsCode:
const inputData = $input.all()[0];
const body = inputData.json || inputData.body || inputData;

const output = {
  name: body.name || (body.body && body.body.name) || '',
  phone: body.phone || (body.body && body.body.phone) || '',
  company: body.company || (body.body && body.body.company) || '',
  industry: body.industry || (body.body && body.body.industry) || '',
  city: body.city || (body.body && body.body.city) || '',
  business_age: body.business_age || (body.body && body.body.business_age) || '',
  inn: body.inn || (body.body && body.body.inn) || '',
  site: body.site || (body.body && body.body.site) || '',
  vk: body.vk || (body.body && body.body.vk) || '',
  telegram: body.telegram || (body.body && body.body.telegram) || '',
  instagram: body.instagram || (body.body && body.body.instagram) || '',
  yandex: body.yandex || (body.body && body.body.yandex) || '',
  avito: body.avito || (body.body && body.body.avito) || '',
  other_links: body.other_links || (body.body && body.body.other_links) || '',
  problems: body.problems || (body.body && body.body.problems) || '',
  goals: body.goals || (body.body && body.body.goals) || '',
  automation_vision: body.automation_vision || (body.body && body.body.automation_vision) || '',
  result_goal: body.result_goal || (body.body && body.body.result_goal) || '',
  page_source: body.page_source || (body.body && body.body.page_source) || '',
  submitted_at: new Date().toLocaleString('ru-RU'),
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
};

return output;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }], temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 2000 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: 'ВСТАВЬТЕ_CHAT_ID', text: '🔔 Новый аудит готов!
